suite.name: Backend Smoke

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://127.0.0.1:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/ path_url=/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/create-tables path_url=/api/v1/create-tables headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/create-tables path_url=/api/v1/create-tables headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/register path_url=/api/v1/auth/register headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '172', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"first_name": "Robot", "last_name": "Framework", "email": "robot_20260313123858675783@example.com", "role": "admin", "phone": "+212600000000", "password": "RobotPass123!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/me path_url=/api/v1/auth/me headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJyb2JvdF8yMDI2MDMxMzEyMzg1ODY3NTc4M0BleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsInVzZXJfaWQiOjMzLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM0MDE5MzksImV4cCI6MTc3MzQwNTUzOX0.nRnFyYzRWNOltmj0k0L7jawWBAlWje1euddQ1oH359w'} body=None
